FAILURE TO MAINTAIN: DEFECTS ARE: BRICK WORK CRACKED MOTOR JOINTS OPEN AT 2ND FLOR FRONT OF BUILDING COPING STONE LOOSE AND MISSING AT ROOF . ALSO NOTED:FRONT DOOR AT GROUND FLOOR OPEN LEADING TO VACANT 2ND FLO

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN DEFECT IS:EXCESSIVE ACCUMULATION OF COMBUSTIBLE MATERIAL-TIRES,MATTRESS,FURNITURE,REFRIGERATORS AND OTHER STUFF AT REAR OF THE BUILDING.REMEDY:REMOVE ALL STUFF AND GARAGE,CLEAN YARD.

SIDEWALK SHED DOES NOT MEET CODE SPECIFICATIONS. NEW BLDG UNDER CONSTRUCTION VIA JOB #402591824 HAS INSTALLED SIDEWALK SHED AROUND THE PREMISES & AT 2 SUBWAY STAIRS FOR MTA F TRAINS LAST STOP VIA JOB

AT TIME OF INSPECTION AT A MIXED-USE BUILDING OBSERVED IN CELLAR APPROX. FOUR WORKERS INSTALLING COOPER PIPES AND JACK HAMMERING CONCRETE WHERE THE MAIN WATER SUPPLY LINE WITH NO PERMIT ON DOB RECORDS FOR SCOPE

IN CAR PHONE NOT WORKING. CAT ONE TAG EXPIRED.
